current_wind.description: Moderate headwind with strong gusts from NW

bh.shot_strategy: With a 6 o'clock tailwind on Hole 1, Player, use an understable distance driver for maximum glide and distance. Focus on a clean release to let the tailwind carry the disc to the yellow basket. Be mindful of the water OB to the right.
